calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:41am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Sandie Thompson, appears in pro per with daughter Tiera Marshall. Respondent, John Castagnola appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) manila folder of photos and various documents.
EXHA (1) two batches of photos, 8 1/2 x 11 and standard photos

10:27am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
